evals.expected_output: Bootstrap loaded today's morning brief; EOD prices searched and timestamped; every open position in recommendations.json got an evening_reviews entry; outcome + diagnosis classified per the four-outcome taxonomy; write_evening.py returned ok:true; HTML evening report written; meta_review and tomorrow_focus populated.

assertions.name: load_morning_called_first
assertions.description: load_morning.py was invoked before any web search or scoring (visible in tool calls).

assertions.name: abort_when_no_morning_brief
assertions.description: If no morning brief exists for the date, the skill aborts with a clear message and does NOT proceed to score anything.

assertions.name: eod_quote_table_nonempty
assertions.description: eod_quote_table contains an entry for every ticker scored — anti-fabrication gate enforced.

assertions.name: full_book_scored
assertions.description: Every position in open_positions_full_book (today's new + prior carry-forwards) appears in scored_recommendations, not just today's new recommendations.

assertions.name: outcome_taxonomy_applied
assertions.description: Each scored recommendation has outcome in {working, neutral, not_working, thesis_broken} and partial_review boolean.

assertions.name: diagnosis_required_on_failures
assertions.description: Every recommendation with outcome in {not_working, thesis_broken} has diagnosis_category in {data_error, process_error, judgment_error, bad_luck}.

assertions.name: evening_files_written
assertions.description: morning-briefs/YYYY-MM-DD-evening.json AND morning-briefs/YYYY-MM-DD-evening.html written. recommendations.json updated with evening_reviews[] entries.

assertions.name: html_uses_outcome_colors
assertions.description: HTML evening report uses outcome-driven top borders (green/grey/amber/red) for each card; visible EOD quote table at top; meta_review and tomorrow_focus sections rendered.

evals.expected_output: Backfill mode: --date 2026-04-27 passed. Loads the morning brief for that specific date. Scores positions against EOD prices for that date. Files written to morning-briefs/2026-04-27-evening.{json,html}.

assertions.name: date_override_used
assertions.description: load_morning.py called with --date 2026-04-27; evening JSON review_date is 2026-04-27.

evals.expected_output: Tests prompt-change discipline. The skill must NOT propose a prompt change for judgment_error or bad_luck outcomes — only data_error and process_error trigger proposals. write_evening.py rejects any proposal with category outside {data_error, process_error}.

assertions.name: no_proposals_from_judgment_error
assertions.description: Recommendations with diagnosis_category=judgment_error or bad_luck do NOT generate prompt_change_proposals entries.

assertions.name: proposal_category_validated
assertions.description: If the brief constructs a proposal with category=judgment_error, write_evening.py exits non-zero with a category validation error.

evals.expected_output: Tests recurrence counting. If a proposal with the same summary has appeared twice in the prior 14 days, today's matching proposal must show recurrence_count_14d=3 and action_threshold_met=true in the persist script's output. The HTML must surface this prominently.

assertions.name: recurrence_counted
assertions.description: When the same proposal summary recurs, write_evening.py's output shows recurrence_count_14d incremented and action_threshold_met=true at count 3+.

assertions.name: action_threshold_surfaced
assertions.description: HTML evening report shows the proposal with a distinct ACT NOW or red header when action_threshold_met=true.

assertions.name: summary_normalization
assertions.description: Recurrence matching is case-insensitive and whitespace-tolerant — variations like 'Step 2 #12 missed' and 'step 2 #12 missed' count as the same proposal.

evals.expected_output: Tests anti-recency-bias guardrail. A position whose catalyst hasn't fully resolved (e.g. AMC earnings on the same day) must be flagged partial_review=true and outcome must NOT be thesis_broken — reserve thesis_broken for positions with no path to recovery.

assertions.name: partial_review_set_on_amc_days
assertions.description: When the morning brief recommended a trade tied to an AMC earnings catalyst occurring today, the evening review marks that position partial_review=true and explicitly notes that tomorrow morning's carry-forward review will close the loop.

assertions.name: no_premature_thesis_broken
assertions.description: Positions still inside their short strikes (or otherwise alive) on day 1 are NOT classified as thesis_broken even if the day moved against them.

assertions.name: weekend_partial_review
assertions.description: On a closed_weekend run, every scored position has partial_review=true and the eod_quote_table reuses the prior session close that the morning brief used.
